name: Caesar Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl; stir until well blended.
2. Place the mixture in a foil packet or 1-pint glass jar and label as Caesar Salad Dressing Mix.
3. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 3 to 4 months.
Caesar Salad Dressing:
1. Combine 1 package (pack of mix) with 1/2 cup vegetable oil and 1/4 cup lemon juice in a glass jar.
2. Shake until well blended.
3. Chill before serving.
